description.en: Batch normalization stabilized deep-network training by normalizing intermediate activations during mini-batch learning. It made higher learning rates and deeper networks easier to use in practice.
description.zh: 批归一化通过在小批量学习中归一化中间激活值来稳定深度网络训练。它让更高学习率和更深网络在实践中更容易使用。

caption.zh: 克里斯蒂安·塞格迪肖像

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of batch statistics and learned scale.
subcaption.zh: 关于批统计量与可学习缩放的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
